content:
Thunderbird for Android doesn't support any in app filtering. Server side filtering via your webmail settings can be an alternative depending on your use case.

The feature has been requested by the community on Mozilla connect. You can show interest by voting for it at the link below.

https://connect.mozilla.org/t5/ideas/filtering-with-android-thunderbird/idi-p/61144
creator: platform34

content:
Thunderbird for Android doesn't support in app filtering. Server side filtering via your webmail settings can automatically move emails to a folder.

The feature has been requested by the community on Mozilla connect. You can show interest by voting for it at the link below.

https://connect.mozilla.org/t5/ideas/filtering-with-android-thunderbird/idi-p/61144
creator: platform34
